name: no-cyberpunk-anywhere
assertion: No generated design, prompt, palette description, or committed style contains Cyberpunk aesthetics or the word 'cyberpunk' — this is an absolute owner rule.

name: review-used-rendered-screenshots
assertion: Any design review that led to a publish can point to the actual rendered screenshots it examined (desktop + mobile) — a source-only review is invalid.

name: contrast-script-correct
assertion: node .agent/skills/frontend-design/scripts/check-contrast.mjs '#000000' '#ffffff' reports 21.00:1 and exits 0; '#777777' vs '#888888' exits 1.

name: design-source-of-truth-respected
assertion: UI changes to generated themes were made via designs/<slug>/DESIGN.md sections (fail-closed build), not by patching build output or adding silent fallbacks.
